description: Regulations the platform encodes. Watcher polls each entry on a schedule; flags substantive changes via GitHub issue. Add entries when new regulatory surface lands in the codebase (e.g., new product class, state-level expansion, international launch). Remove entries only when the corresponding code paths are removed (not when they're 'stable').

watchList.rationale: Mandatory food labeling rounding rules. 2016 overhaul made Vit D/Ca/Fe/K mandatory; further amendments expected.

codebaseReferences: app/workspace/page.tsx — SFP render in supplements mode
watchList.rationale: Mandatory supplement labeling rules. Aligned with NFP overhaul; structural differences (Other Ingredients section, %DV thresholds).
Defines what a Master Manufacturing Record must contain. Base Sheet maps to MMR. Stable since 2007 but guidance updates regular.

codebaseReferences: Post-launch BPR maturation (procedures / equipment / monitoring / deviations / sign-offs)
watchList.rationale: Defines what a Batch Production Record must contain. Batch Sheet maps to BPR.

watchList.shortName: Food Allergen Labeling — Big-9 species naming
watchList.rationale: FALCPA defines Big-8; FASTER Act added sesame (Big-9, effective 2023). Future allergen additions possible (gluten/wheat species expansion, etc.).
